title: Fix documentation drift: canonicalize version/sprint status across README, roadmap, and handoffs
description:
Reconcile version numbers and sprint status across all documentation files. Per the audit, `README.md` says v0.28.0, `roadmap.md` says v0.23.0, and sprint handoff docs disagree on completion status of older sprints.

Implementation:
1. Audit all version/sprint references:
   - `README.md` — version number, sprint, test count
   - `Data/Pages/roadmap.md` — version, latest sprint
   - All handoff docs in `Data/Pages/Handoffs/` — completion status consistency
   - `WebUI.Blazor/wwwroot/about.html` — version badge
2. Pick ONE canonical version: v0.51.0 (Sprint 51 complete, 742 tests) as of 2026-06-26.
3. Update all files to match.
4. Add a `last-verified` field to each sprint handoff:
   ```md
   **Last verified against code:** 2026-06-26, commit abc123
   ```
5. Add a CI-friendly version file: `version.json` or `VERSION.txt` that all docs reference.
6. Document the canonical-status policy in AGENTS.md or a new `Data/Pages/policies/doc-drift.md`.

Acceptance:
- All docs agree on version v0.51.0.
- Sprint handoffs include last-verified commit.
- Policy exists for keeping docs in sync with code.

Refs: `msa_planning_mineflayer_audit_20260621_1437.md` Finding 1
